data.title: West Wits Mining to Quote New Securities on ASX
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from West Wits Mining Limited ( (AU:WWI) ).

West Wits Mining Limited has announced the issuance of 431,375,000 ordinary fully paid securities, which are set to be quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) as of September 19, 2025. This move is part of previously announced transactions and is expected to enhance the company’s financial standing and operational capacity, potentially impacting its market positioning positively.

More about West Wits Mining Limited

West Wits Mining Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the exploration and development of gold mining projects. The company is engaged in advancing its projects to increase production and expand its market presence.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$138.9M

data.title: Matex International Settles Leadership Changes with Key Resignations
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Matex International Limited ( (SG:M15) ).

Matex International Limited has entered into a settlement agreement involving the resignation of Dr. Tan Pang Kee and Mr. Tan Guan Liang from their positions within the company. The agreement includes financial settlements and non-compete clauses, and it also involves the termination of subscription agreements with Ms. Gan Peiling and Ms. Lim Yan Peng. This settlement is expected to impact the company’s operational dynamics and stakeholder relationships, potentially stabilizing its governance structure and market positioning.

More about Matex International Limited

Matex International Limited, incorporated in Singapore, operates within the industry of providing specialized products and services. The company focuses on expanding its market presence through strategic partnerships and share subscriptions.

Average Trading Volume: 844,125

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$11.35M

data.title: Integrated Research Announces 2025 AGM Date and Director Nominations
data.description:
Integrated Research Limited ( (AU:IRI) ) just unveiled an update.

Integrated Research Limited has announced that its 2025 Annual General Meeting will be held on November 24, 2025. The company also stated that nominations for director positions must be submitted by September 26, 2025. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it provides an opportunity to influence the company’s governance and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:IRI) stock is a Buy with a A$0.55 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Integrated Research Limited stock, see the AU:IRI Stock Forecast page.

More about Integrated Research Limited

Integrated Research Limited (ASX: IRI) is a leading global provider specializing in user experience and performance management solutions for payment transactions and collaborative systems. The company leverages a real-time, scalable, and extensible hybrid cloud platform, combined with deep domain knowledge, to optimize operations of mission-critical systems and enhance user experience through intelligent insights. Integrated Research serves many of the world’s largest organizations by simplifying complexity and providing visibility over essential systems.

data.title: Metalero Mining Unveils Promising Copper and Gold Anomalies at Benson Project
data.description:
An announcement from Cortus Metals ( (TSE:MLO) ) is now available.

Metalero Mining Corp. has announced promising results from its ionic leach soil geochemical survey at the Cantin Target within the Benson Project in British Columbia’s Quesnel Trough. The survey revealed substantial copper and gold anomalies, indicating strong potential for porphyry-style mineralization. These findings will guide further exploration activities, including sampling and drill targeting, as Metalero aims to capitalize on the booming copper production in the region. The Benson Project’s strategic location and proximity to infrastructure enhance its potential for efficient exploration and development, positioning Metalero favorably within the competitive mining landscape.

More about Cortus Metals

Metalero Mining Corp. operates within the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily engaged in identifying and advancing copper and gold projects, particularly in the Quesnel Trough of British Columbia, a region known for its rich mineral deposits and significant mining activity.

Average Trading Volume: 60,209

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.27M

data.title: Otto Energy Reports FY25 Financial Results with Strategic Leadership Changes
data.description:
The latest update is out from Otto Energy Limited ( (AU:OEL) ).

Otto Energy Limited reported its financial results for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, highlighting a net operating revenue of US$15.6 million, a decrease from the previous year due to lower crude prices and production declines. Despite these challenges, the company achieved a net profit after tax of US$0.7 million and maintained a debt-free status with enhanced liquidity, including a cash balance of US$14.9 million. The company is committed to streamlining its corporate structure and maximizing revenue from its assets, with recent changes in executive leadership, including the appointment of Chris Dorros as CEO.

More about Otto Energy Limited

Otto Energy Limited is an energy company operating in the oil and gas industry, focusing on maximizing revenues from its existing asset base and reducing costs. The company has offices in Australia and Houston, Texas, and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: OEL).

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$21.58M

For an in-depth examination of OEL stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: MyState Limited Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Mystate Limited ( (AU:MYS) ) has issued an update.

MyState Limited has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for October 21, 2025, at the MyState Bank Arena in Glenorchy, Tasmania, with an option for online attendance. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it provides an opportunity to discuss the company’s strategic direction and operational performance, impacting its future positioning in the financial services industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MYS) stock is a Buy with a A$4.58 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mystate Limited stock, see the AU:MYS Stock Forecast page.

More about Mystate Limited

MyState Limited is an ASX-listed non-operating holding company overseeing a diversified financial services group that includes MyState Bank, Auswide Bank, and TPT Wealth, a trustee and wealth management company. These entities are regulated by the Australian Prudential Regulatory Authority and hold Australian Financial Services Licences from the Australian Securities and Investments Commission.

data.title: Advanced Systems Automation Faces New Financial Demand from ASTI Holdings
data.description:
An announcement from Advanced Systems Automation Limited ( (SG:WJ9) ) is now available.

Advanced Systems Automation Limited has received a letter of demand from ASTI Holdings Limited, requiring the repayment of an outstanding amount totaling S$9,873,139.26, along with accrued interest. This demand follows previous legal interactions between the two companies, including the withdrawal of a statutory demand by ASTI. The letter stipulates a repayment deadline, indicating ongoing financial and legal challenges for Advanced Systems Automation, which may impact its financial stability and stakeholder relations.

More about Advanced Systems Automation Limited

Advanced Systems Automation Limited, incorporated in Singapore in 1986, operates in the automation industry. The company focuses on providing advanced automation solutions and services, catering to various sectors that require efficient and innovative automation technologies.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$11.45M

See more data about WJ9 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ryder Capital Ltd. Updates on Market Buy-Back Program
data.description:
The latest update is out from Ryder Capital Ltd. ( (AU:RYD) ).

Ryder Capital Ltd. has announced an update on its ongoing on-market buy-back program. As of September 19, 2025, the company reported buying back a total of 48,417 ordinary fully paid securities on the previous day, adding to the cumulative total of 139,839 securities bought back before that day. This buy-back initiative is part of Ryder Capital’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Magnum Mining & Exploration Announces Expiry of Listed Options
data.description:
Magnum Mining and Exploration Limited ( (AU:MGU) ) has provided an announcement.

Magnum Mining & Exploration Limited announced the expiration of 193,996,767 listed options on October 31, 2025, which are currently out of the money. The official quotation of these options will cease on October 27, 2025. The company’s share price is significantly below the exercise price of the options, indicating limited likelihood of exercise, impacting potential capital inflow from these options.
